# DocsRender

Markdown rendering for generated docs: mermaid fences, escape-link rewriting, containment.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `guardrail_hub.docs_render` | XS | 0 | 4 |

## Public API

### `guardrail_hub.docs_render`
- def `rewrite_href` ‚Äî Rewrite a link that escapes docs/generated to the /file/ route.
- def `render_markdown` ‚Äî Render one generated doc to an HTML fragment.
- def `render_plain` ‚Äî Non-markdown file bodies: escaped preformatted text.
- def `contained` ‚Äî Resolve ``candidate`` and require it inside ``root`` (symlink-safe).
